performance_claims.claim: [Music] an impressive new study led by the prestigious Imperial College London looked at the effect a daily beet juice supplement had on a devastating and irreversible chronic health condition that affects over 400 million people worldwide and in this video we're going to look at the impressive findings and highlight why this could be beneficial for everyone not just those suffering from this particular condition this study was one of the longest duration studies in this area so far and the results are quote very promising COPD is a serious and life-altering lung condition that currently has no cure the research has decided to see what impact a 12we course of a concentrated beetroot juice supplement that's high in nitrates had on this condition against a beet juice Placebo that looked and tasted the same but had the nitrate removed higher levels of nitrate in our blood can increase the availability of nitric oxide a chemical that helps our blood vessels relax it also increases the efficiency of our muscles meaning they need less oxygen to do the same work the study included 81 participants with COPD who are being treated at the raw Brompton Hospital in London and whose systolic blood pressure measured higher than 130 mm of mercury the scientist measured the participants blood pressure and tested how far patients could walk in 6 minutes at the beginning and end of the study participants were randomly allocated to either receive the 12we course of nitrate Rich beet supplement that was made up of 70 mL of concentrated beet juice this equated to 400 mg of nitrate once a day or the placebo and what the researchers found was extremely encouraging those taking the nitrate Rich beet juice supplement experienced a notable reduction in their systolic blood pressure compared to those who consumed the placebo and they walked 98 ft farther on average in 6 minutes the lead author said at the end of the study we found that the blood pressure of people taking the nitrate Rich beetroot juice drink was lower and their blood vessels became less stiff the juice also increased how far people with COPD could walk in 6 minutes compared to Placebo this is one of the longest duration studies in this area so far the results are very promising but will need to be confirmed in larger longer term studies now beet juice is not just beneficial for those with a chronic heart or lung condition but possibly for the majority of us beet juice has been growing in popularity here in the UK ever since Leicester city a football club in England overcame the Staggering odds of 5,000 to1 to win the Premier League title in 2016 the players in part credited it to beet juice which they drank every day scientists hypothesized that it helped them recover quicker than other players and help them to avoid injury during their stunning run to win the Premier League not only has Beach juice been shown to have an anti-inflammatory effect reduce muscle soreness after vigorous exercise but it also may increase stamina by improving oxygen utilization and time to exhaustion a word of caution beets are high in oxalates so if you're prone to calcium o oate kidney stones you may need to avoid beet juice and people with chronic kidney disease and endstage renal disease who follow a low pottassium diet need to consult their healthc care [Music] an impressive new study led by the prestigious Imperial College London looked at the effect a daily beet juice supplement had on a devastating and irreversible chronic health condition that affects over 400 million people worldwide and in this video we're going to look at the impressive findings and highlight why this could be beneficial for everyone not just those suffering from this particular condition this study was one of the longest duration studies in this area so far and the results are quote very promising COPD is a serious and life-altering lung condition that currently has no cure the research has decided to see what impact a 12we course of a concentrated beetroot juice supplement that's high in nitrates had on this condition against a beet juice Placebo that looked and tasted the same but had the nitrate removed higher levels of nitrate in our blood can increase the availability of nitric oxide a chemical that helps our blood vessels relax it also increases the efficiency of our muscles meaning they need less oxygen to do the same work the study included 81 participants with COPD who are being treated at the raw Brompton Hospital in London and whose systolic blood pressure measured higher than 130 mm of mercury the scientist measured the participants blood pressure and tested how far patients could walk in 6 minutes at the beginning and end of the study participants were randomly allocated to either receive the 12we course of nitrate Rich beet supplement that was made up of 70 mL of concentrated beet juice this equated to 400 mg of nitrate once a day or the placebo and what the researchers found was extremely encouraging those taking the nitrate Rich beet juice supplement experienced a notable reduction in their systolic blood pressure compared to those who consumed the placebo and they walked 98 ft farther on average in 6 minutes the lead author said at the end of the study we found that the blood pressure of people taking the nitrate Rich beetroot juice drink was lower and their blood vessels became less stiff the juice also increased how far people with COPD could walk in 6 minutes compared to Placebo this is one of the longest duration studies in this area so far the results are very promising but will need to be confirmed in larger longer term studies now beet juice is not just beneficial for those with a chronic heart or lung condition but possibly for the majority of us beet juice has been growing in popularity here in the UK ever since Leicester city a football club in England overcame the Staggering odds of 5,000 to1 to win the Premier League title in 2016 the players in part credited it to beet juice which they drank every day scientists hypothesized that it helped them recover quicker than other players and help them to avoid injury during their stunning run to win the Premier League not only has Beach juice been shown to have an anti-inflammatory effect reduce muscle soreness after vigorous exercise but it also may increase stamina by improving oxygen utilization and time to exhaustion a word of caution beets are high in oxalates so if you're prone to calcium o oate kidney stones you may need to avoid beet juice and people with chronic kidney disease and endstage renal disease who follow a low pottassium diet need to consult their healthc care professional before consuming beet juice due to its high potassium content thank you so much for watching if you liked the video please give it a thumbs up leave a comment below and subscribe for more upcoming videos [Music] come [Music]

choline in the body choline is an essential nutrient that helps nerves send messages from one location to another within the body without enough choline nerve cells cannot function properly and flow throughout your body including your muscles and brain this allows for greater oxygen delivery to your organs and muscles so you can perform better during workouts but tannin and beets is also absorbed slowly into the bloodstream which means it can supply energy for longer periods liking our video so far before we move on to the next benefit don't forget to hit the like button and subscribe to our channel so you never miss out on our new informative videos number four lowers blood pressure high blood pressure is one of the most important risk factors for heart attack and stroke the good news is that many foods can help lower blood pressure naturally if you have high blood pressure you may want to give beet juice a try a new study found that drinking beet juice can significantly lower your blood pressure beets are packed with nutrients like folate potassium and magnesium these minerals help to relax blood vessels and reduce inflammation which are both common cause of high blood pressure beet juice also increases nitric oxide levels in your body which relaxes your blood vessels and lowers your blood pressure a study found that after two weeks of drinking beet juice the participants had a significant reduction in their systolic blood pressure systolic blood pressure is the top number that represents the force of blood against artery walls when the heart beats number five promotes healthy skin the benefits of beet juice for the skin are many beet juice is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce redness and improve skin tone antioxidants are a group of nutrients that protect your skin from the damaging effects of ultraviolet light and other environmental factors these nutrients include vitamins a c and e and carotenoids such as lycopene and beta-carotene antioxidants also work to slow down or prevent cell damage that occurs with age or sun exposure as you age your body produces fewer antioxidants and it becomes harder for it to repair damaged DNA strands this increases your risk of developing cancerous cells in the future beet juice also contains betalane which helps fight free radicals that cause wrinkles and dark spots in the skin beta lanes are pigments that give color to a variety of fruits and vegetables the most common beta lanes are beta cyanines which give beets their deep red color number six May prevent dementia drinking beet juice has been shown to improve brain health and boost cognition beetroot juice is rich in nitrates which are converted into nitric oxide in the body nitric oxide helps relax blood vessels which improves blood flow and oxygen levels to the brain this boosts brain health and cognitive performance a new study shows that nitric oxide protects against Alzheimer's for brain function for example it can help how well neurons communicate with each other but its exact role hasn't been clear number seven lowers cholesterol levels the juice of beets is a natural your blood it can lead to heart disease and stroke a high level of cholesterol is a major risk factor for heart disease as well as other serious conditions like diabetes and cancer beets are rich in folate which helps reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease folate is important for cardiovascular health because it helps to prevent levels of homocysteine from becoming too high homocysteine is an amino acid that can damage blood vessels and contribute to the hardening of the arteries researchers found that drinking beet juice can lower bad cholesterol levels by as much as 13 percent within one hour after consumption the researchers also noted that beet juice consumption did not affect good cholesterol or triglyceride levels number eight promotes Eye Health beet juice has been shown to
